name: Groupe JAJ
summary: Groupe JAJ distributes clothing, shoes, and accessories. The company offers clothes, textile goods, leather goods, shoes, and accessories of Schott trademarks. It offers products through a network of agents, Webstores, stores, and shops in Europe. The company was formerly known as JAJ Distribution and changed its name to Groupe JAJ. Groupe JAJ is headquartered in Montreuil, France.
